description: You are closing out the 'Exmh' software project. Your task is to archive the communication history and formally close the loop. Move all emails from your Inbox with 'exmh' in the subject line (case-insensitive) into a new folder named 'Project-Exmh'. Reply to the oldest email in that folder with the text 'Acknowledging for archival.' and forward the newest email in that folder to 'archive@internal.org' with the subject prefix 'Project Closeout: ' followed by the original subject.
